snippet.title: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide - Skitarii | Class Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
The Skitarii class is coming to Warhammer 40,000: Darktide June 23.

Wishlist now on Steam:
► https://fatshark.games/08TKqZ

The Adeptus Mechanicus will not see the secrets of Hive Tertium fall into the hands of heretics, the Skitarii Alpha Primus are elite operatives devoted to serving the will of the Omnissiah. They will annihilate all who stand in their way.

Learn more about Darktide's new class
► https://fatshark.games/lfMTcr

Don't miss the massive savings during Warhammer Skulls (May 21-28) on all Fatshark Warhammer games, DLCs and digital upgrades.

snippet.description:

Shop "the cure" on 7" vinyl and cassette featuring an exclusive bonus song called "never do" that's not on the album: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store

Lyrics:
All the pretty girls in the foreground of my mind
I thought I’d done enough, but they keep moving the line
I thought I found the antidote this time
I thought I found the antidote this time
 
All the nights I spend fighting bad thoughts in my room
Feeling so alone, might as well be on the moon
I thought I found the antidote with you
I thought I found the antidote with you
 
But my head is full of poison
And my heart is full of doubt
I got toxins in my bloodstream
You tried hard to suck them out
And it feels like medication
And it’s good for me I’m sure
But it don’t matter how your love feels anymore
It’ll never be the cure
It’ll never be the cure
 
Used to play a game in my head
When I’d date a guy
Tally up the girls that he fucked
‘Til I start to cry
I thought I found the antidote this time
I thought I found the antidote this time
 
But I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled

I’m unraveled
 
And my head is full of poison
And my heart is full of doubt
I got toxins in my bloodstream
You tried hard to suck them out
And it feels like medication
And it’s good for me I’m sure
But it don’t matter how your love feels anymore
It’ll never be the cure
It’ll never be the cure
 
Ohh
‘Cause baby I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
 
Why can’t you come stitch me up?
Why can’t it ever be enough?
Why can’t you come stitch me up?
Why can’t it ever be enough?
It’s not enough
 
Oh because my head is full of poison
And my heart is full of doubt
I got toxins in my bloodstream
You tried so hard to suck out
And it feels like medication
And it’s good for me I’m sure
But it don’t matter how your love feels anymore
It’ll never be the cure
It’ll never be the cure
It’ll never be

snippet.title: TV Royale | EVO Princess, HERO Tombstone, NEW Game Mode, and MORE!
snippet.description:
Check the Patch Notes: https://supr.cl/Update_June26

Coming with the update:
🃏 Collection Levels
💎 Mastery Rework

Over the next season:
❄️ EVO Princess
💀 HERO Tombstone
👑 Princess Gambit
🏟️ Seasonal Arenas
🩷 Victory Run Event

X ► https://twitter.com/ClashRoyale/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashroyale
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashroyale
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashRoyale/

ENTER THE ARENA
Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles. From the creators of CLASH OF CLANS comes a real-time multiplayer battle game starring your favourite Clash characters and more. Start battling against players from around the world!

BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY AND DECK BUILDING
Choose unique Cards to your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for Battle!
Place your Cards right and knock down the enemy King and Tower Troops from their Towers in a strategic and fast-paced match.

COLLECT AND UPGRADE 100+ CARDS
Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ Cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defences you know and love and many others. Win battles and progress to new Arenas to unlock powerful new Cards to your collection!

BATTLE YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Battle your way to the League and Global Tournaments to match against the best players in the world.
Compete for glory and rewards!

SEASONAL EVENTS
Unlock new Seasonal items like Tower Skins, Emotes and powerful Magic Items with the Season Pass and participate in fun Challenges that put your skills to the test!

JOIN A CLAN AND GO TO WAR
Join or form a Clan with other players to share Cards and battle in Clan Wars for BIG rewards!

See you in the Arena!
#ClashRoyale

snippet.title: Can You Beat Baldi's Basics Plus With NO ITEMS?
snippet.description:
Baldi's Basics Plus is in my mind the most disrespected indie horror franchise on YouTube. Nowadays the most popular videos on Baldi are just Fast Fredbear esc slop horror mods of the original game, and I think that's a crime as Baldi's Basics Plus is in my opinion one of the best indie horror games out there. Honestly it beats out stuff like Poppy Playtime, Bendy, and even a lot of the FNaF games for me, even in early access it's pretty solid. So to give Baldi's Basics Plus the spotlight it deserves, I wanted to try and complete the game with no items and only one life, so if Baldi catches me once throughout the entire game, I have to restart the whole thing. This ended up being the hardest challenge I've ever attempted, causing me to put close to 50 hours into it in hopes of winning. Also, if you've actually somehow read this description, comment the phrase "I really love Baldi Baldimore" (yes that is his full name) so I know you're a real one, thanks!

----------------------------------------
CHAPTERS:
0:00 Prologue
1:56 Chapter 1
7:26 Chapter 2
14:17 Chapter 3
22:00 Chapter 4
29:52 Chapter 5
34:18 Chapter 6

CREDITS:

TheDapperWaffle: Script Writing, Gameplay, Editing, Art, all that stuff.
https://x.com/TheDapperWaffle

JoyfulFreddy on Discord: Creating the "Withered TheDapperWaffle" model used in the Springtrap scene.

Saintza: Creating the Baldi model used in the thumbnail and a few of the teasers.

there are no other words beyond this point, I think you might be seeing things.
----------------------------------------
baldi, huggy wuggy, challenge, speedrun, miss circle, classic remastered, hello neighbor, i'm lowkey just saying words at this point, FNaF World, gameplay, secret ending, 99, null, partlykloudy reeks of salty salmon, joseph, mod

snippet.title: F1 25: 2026 Season Pack Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
Wishlist F1 25: 2026 Season Pack on Xbox, Steam & EA App. Releasing June 3, 2026 on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S and PC 👉 https://x.ea.com/89231

Drive the groundbreaking new era of F1® with the 2026 rules and regulations, delivering action-packed racing as you tactically use the new Overtake mode and active aerodynamics to outsmart the grid and propel yourself to victory. 

Master the new MADRING circuit and forge your racing legacy to fight for Championship Glory in Career mode, or take control of your own team and become the 12th team on the grid in My Team, where you can customize your car and line up alongside new teams, Audi and Cadillac.

Get all the F1® 25: 2026 Season Pack information here 👉
Subscribe to @EASPORTSF1 for upcoming F1® 25 trailers and news.

Follow all the EA SPORTS F1 social channels 👉 https://linktr.ee/easportsf1
